# PERF-027 negative: bytes.Buffer is served from a sync.Pool
lang: go
file: PERF-027-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"net/http"
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var bufPool = sync.Pool{
	New: func() interface{} {
		return &bytes.Buffer{}
	},
}

func Render(c *gin.Context) {
	buf := bufPool.Get().(*bytes.Buffer)
	buf.Reset()
	buf.WriteString("hello")
	c.Data(http.StatusOK, "text/plain", buf.Bytes())
	bufPool.Put(buf)
}
